testcase.name: User authentication with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-17" and checkout "2026-07-18".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 2
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-20" and checkout "2026-07-21".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 3
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-12-15" and checkout "2026-12-20".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 4
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-01" and checkout "2026-08-05".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability for specific dates 5
testcase.system-out: When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-17" and checkout "2026-07-17".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 200...........................passed And Response should contain available rooms.................................passed And Available rooms list should not be empty................................passed

testcase.name: Check room availability with invalid date formats and ranges

failure.message: Response status code mismatch. Expected: 400 Actual: 200 Body: {"rooms":[{"roomid":1,"roomName":"101","type":"Single","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room1.jpg","description":"Aenean porttitor mauris sit amet lacinia molestie. In posuere accumsan aliquet. Maecenas sit amet nisl massa. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante.","features":["TV","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":100},{"roomid":2,"roomName":"102","type":"Double","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room2.jpg","description":"Vestibulum sollicitudin, lectus ac mollis consequat, lorem orci ultrices tellus, eleifend euismod tortor dui egestas erat. Phasellus et ipsum nisl. ","features":["TV","Radio","Safe"],"roomPrice":150},{"roomid":3,"roomName":"103","type":"Suite","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room3.jpg","description":"Etiam metus metus, fringilla ac sagittis id, consequat vel neque. Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ","features":["Radio","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":225}]} expected [400] but found [200]

testcase.failure:
When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2025-07-25" and checkout "2025-07-20".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 400...........................failed And Response should indicate invalid date range / date format...............skipped
StackTrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Response status code mismatch. Expected: 400 Actual: 200 Body: {"rooms":[{"roomid":1,"roomName":"101","type":"Single","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room1.jpg","description":"Aenean porttitor mauris sit amet lacinia molestie. In posuere accumsan aliquet. Maecenas sit amet nisl massa. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante.","features":["TV","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":100},{"roomid":2,"roomName":"102","type":"Double","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room2.jpg","description":"Vestibulum sollicitudin, lectus ac mollis consequat, lorem orci ultrices tellus, eleifend euismod tortor dui egestas erat. Phasellus et ipsum nisl. ","features":["TV","Radio","Safe"],"roomPrice":150},{"roomid":3,"roomName":"103","type":"Suite","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room3.jpg","description":"Etiam metus metus, fringilla ac sagittis id, consequat vel neque. Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ","features":["Radio","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":225}]} expected [400] but found [200] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:140) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:122) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:907) at com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.API_response_status_code_should_be(RoomManagementAPI.java:89) at ✽.API response status code of RM should be 400(file:///D:/Joshiba/Kata_Cucumber_Project/api_hotel_booking/src/test/resources/features/checkRoomAvailability.feature:46)

testcase.name: Check room availability with invalid date formats and ranges 2

failure.message: Response status code mismatch. Expected: 503 Actual: 500 Body: [] expected [503] but found [500]

testcase.failure:
When User requests to check room availability with checkin "invalid-date" and checkout "2025-07-21".passed Then API response status code of RM should be 503...........................failed And Response should indicate invalid date range / date format...............skipped
